No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly aims to expand cultural knowledge (Target 4.7), fostering skills for sustainable development and global citizenship.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to work, employment, or economic growth.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course's focus on understanding diverse cultures (Target 10.2) and developing global mobility skills (Target 10.7) contributes to social inclusion and facilitates orderly migration.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The link between learning a language and safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4) is too indirect to warrant a score.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate change or action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: While cultural understanding can indirectly foster peace, the syllabus does not explicitly address peace, justice, or institutional strengthening.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing 'Abilities of global mobility' (具備國際交流基本知能) is foundational for international cooperation and knowledge sharing (Target 17.6).
